docs.title: UBC ARC Technical User Documentation
docs.text:
Welcome to the technical documentation for UBC Advanced Research Computing (ARC).

This site covers how to access and use ARC systems and services, including our HPC cluster, object storage, data transfer tools, and research platforms.

docs.title: Our systems and services
docs.text: Resource Description Sockeye UBC's on-premises HPC cluster ARC OnDemand Browser-based access to Sockeye Chinook ARC object storage Globus Large-scale data transfer REDCap Secure research data platform

docs.title: Getting started
docs.text:
New to ARC? Start here:

  1. Request an allocation via ARC Access
  2. Connect to ARC systems
  3. Run your first job on Sockeye

docs.title: Need help?
docs.text: Contact us at arc.support@ubc.ca or check the FAQ.
